    Everything you ever wanted to know about the Google Pixel 6 Pro • Unlocked

    • Durability

    • Overall performance

    • Camera

    • Screen quality

    • 50 megapixelsMain camera

    • 2021Release Year

    • 1.4SAR body

    • UnlockedCarrier compatibility

    • Physical SIM + eSIMSIM card

    • 6,45 inHeight

    • 12 GBMemory (GB)

    • Stormy BlackColor (official name)

    • G8VOUManufacturer Ref.

    The Google Pixel 6 Pro is a high-end smartphone that offers a blend of advanced photography features and clean Android experience. It is a 3rd generation device that remains relevant for users seeking a premium Android device with substantial storage and performance capabilities.

    Key features:
    • Display size: 6.7-inch LTPO OLED with a 120Hz refresh rate
    • Processor: Google Tensor chip for efficient performance
    • Camera system: Triple rear cameras including a 50MP main sensor
    • Operating system: Ships with Android 12, upgradable to newer versions
    • Storage capacity: 256GB of internal storage
    Who is this for?

    The Google Pixel 6 Pro is suitable for photography enthusiasts, Android users who value timely updates, and those needing a large, vibrant display for media consumption. It’s ideal for professionals, tech-savvy users, and anyone looking for a reliable flagship device without the latest model.

    Pros & Cons:
    Pros Cons
    Large, high-quality display with smooth 120Hz refresh rate. Limited storage options beyond 256GB.
    Excellent camera system with advanced computational photography. No wireless charging support.
    Pure Android experience with guaranteed updates. Higher price point compared to mid-range devices.
    Why refurbished?

    Choosing a refurbished Google Pixel 6 Pro offers an opportunity to own a premium device at a more accessible price. Back Market devices undergo rigorous testing to meet high-quality standards, ensuring reliable performance and condition. Learn more about our quality standards.
